title: It is not just songs, Ilaiyaraaja is also integral to Manjanathi, says Mari Selvaraj
description: “Whenever the name Manjanathi came to my mind, I thought of adapting it into a film. Even then, I had decided that maestro Ilaiyaraaja should compose the music. When I met him and narrated the story, he agreed to score it,” the director said.
